description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in athletic wear, featuring a fitted sports bra, high-waisted leggings, and fingerless gloves. The individual is wearing a large, over-ear headset with a visor that covers the eyes, suggesting possible use of augmented or virtual reality technology. The footwear consists of sturdy, lace-up athletic shoes, and the person is standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The figure's build is athletic, with visible muscle definition in the arms and midriff. The hairstyle is short and wavy, with hair kept above the shoulders and partially visible beneath the headset. The overall appearance is modern and urban, suitable for active or tech-oriented environments.
description: An athletic adult wearing sportswear, fingerless gloves, and a large headset with visor, standing in a T-pose. The figure has a short, wavy hairstyle and is equipped with sturdy athletic shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sports bra, headset with visor, fingerless gloves, and athletic shoes, with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the headset, the fit of the leggings, and the athletic shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the sports bra, the headset band, and the back of the leggings and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the headset profile, glove, and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear including a sports bra, high-waisted leggings, and fingerless gloves, accessorized with a large headset and visor
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose
